---
title: "Gibbs Prior - Gibbs Three-Step Only"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
setwd("/Users/brandonmarks/Desktop/Research/Palacios Lab/Untitled/Enertree/Brandon/gibbs_prior")

library(ape)
library(phylodyn)
library(phangorn)
library(phyclust)
library(phylotools)
library(fmatrix)
library(coda)
library(ggplot2)

source("utils.R")

output_root <- file.path("plots", "logZ_comparison")
dir.create(output_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
source("gibbs_prior_joint_standardized_helpers.R")

annotate_summary <- function(summary_df, sampler_type, init_type, include_log_Z, include_log_Z_in_beta = NA) {
  summary_df$sampler_type <- sampler_type
  summary_df$init_type <- init_type
  summary_df$include_log_Z <- include_log_Z
  summary_df$include_log_Z_in_beta <- include_log_Z_in_beta
  summary_df
}
```

## Shared Data

```{r}
n_tips <- 25
set.seed(123)

sequences <- as.phyDat(read.FASTA("sequences.fasta"))

M_true_tree <- read.tree("true_tree.newick")
inter_coal_times <- coalescent.intervals(M_true_tree)$interval.length
inter_coal_times[which(inter_coal_times <= 0.000001)] <- 0.0000001
true_coalescent_times <- cumsum(inter_coal_times)
M_true_fmat <- gen_Fmat(M_true_tree, tol = 8)
```

### Reference Matrices

```{r}
dm <- dist.hamming(sequences)

upgma_tree <- upgma(dm)
upgma_tree <- update_time(upgma_tree, true_coalescent_times)
M_upgma_fmat <- gen_Fmat(upgma_tree, tol = 8)
```

### BEAST Reference Data

```{r}
trees_beast_compare <- read.nexus("HKY1000Gibbs-sequences.trees")
beast_compare_fmats <- lapply(trees_beast_compare, gen_Fmat, tol = 8)
```

### Shared Log Z Cache

```{r}
uniform_tree_cache <- generate_proposal_tree_chain_cache(
  n_trees = 100000,
  n_tips = n_tips
)
```

# Gibbs Three-Step

## UPGMA Init, Log Z = TRUE

```{r}
gibbs_upgma_logZ_true_result <- run_gibbs_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "gibbs_upgma_logZ_true",
  init_M = M_upgma_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  n_iter = 10000,
  tree_inner_iter = 25,
  inner_take_every = 10,
  beta_init = 1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = TRUE,
  beta_cap = 10,
  n_label_samples = 10,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

gibbs_upgma_logZ_true_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = gibbs_upgma_logZ_true_result,
    experiment_id = "gibbs_upgma_logZ_true",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, gibbs_upgma_logZ_true_result$average_M),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 200,
    true_tree = M_true_tree,
    beast_compare_trees = trees_beast_compare
  ),
  sampler_type = "gibbs",
  init_type = "upgma",
  include_log_Z = TRUE,
  include_log_Z_in_beta = NA
)
```

## True Init, Log Z = TRUE

```{r}
gibbs_true_init_logZ_true_result <- run_gibbs_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "gibbs_true_init_logZ_true",
  init_M = M_true_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  n_iter = 10000,
  tree_inner_iter = 25,
  inner_take_every = 10,
  beta_init = 1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = TRUE,
  beta_cap = 10,
  n_label_samples = 25,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

gibbs_true_init_logZ_true_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = gibbs_true_init_logZ_true_result,
    experiment_id = "gibbs_true_init_logZ_true",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, gibbs_true_init_logZ_true_result$average_M),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 201,
    true_tree = M_true_tree,
    beast_compare_trees = trees_beast_compare
  ),
  sampler_type = "gibbs",
  init_type = "true_init",
  include_log_Z = TRUE,
  include_log_Z_in_beta = NA
)
```

# Summary

```{r}
experiment_summary <- rbind(
  gibbs_upgma_logZ_true_summary,
  gibbs_true_init_logZ_true_summary
)

print(experiment_summary)
```
